title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: self-contained LLM runner that bundles model weights, config and data into a single Modelfile and serves them via an OpenAI-compatible API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed and pull models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package offering Ollama LLM and embeddings components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Clean open-source ChatGPT-style web UI that talks to a local Ollama instance.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Lightweight interactive CLI wrapper around the Ollama REST API with conversation history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub-Copilot-like pair-programmer.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API and reactive streaming.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal reference implementation of retrieval-augmented generation using Ollama + Chroma.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator components.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets a server chat with any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n community node to call Ollama models inside no-code workflows.

title: ollama-curl
summary: Collection of ready-to-paste curl snippets for every Ollama REST endpoint.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and PVC support.

title: ollama-dagger-module
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service container for CI pipelines and tests.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library for Ollama with generate, chat, pull and embeddings methods.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot that answers questions using a local Ollama model via socket-mode.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async wrappers over the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app template that lets users pick any installed Ollama model and chat in the browser.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Official C# / .NET client for Ollama with async enumerable streaming and nullable reference types.
